user_request_mode: per-case explicit request string from manifests/cmu_manifest.csv
notes: Official Anthropic route through Anthropic's OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions endpoint.
This config is for the 20-case one-shot Claude Sonnet 4.6 baseline.
The model is set to the stable alias claude-sonnet-4-6; record the resolved model id from each result config for provenance.
This config preserves the same physics protocol as Gemini, Grok-4, and GPT-5.4: MACE small on CPU with float32 precision and no dispersion.
API key is read from the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable.
